detaileddescription.para: Filter chain management API The filter chain management API is used to dynamically construct filters and add them in a chain.

This function will return a new picture usable by p_filter as an output buffer. You have to release it using picture_Release or by returning it to the caller as a pf_video_filter return value. Provided for convenience.

simplesect.para: new picture on success or NULL on failure

detaileddescription.para: Flush a filter
This function will flush the state of a filter (audio or video).
This function will drain, then flush an audio filter.

This function will return a new subpicture usable by p_filter as an output buffer. You have to release it using subpicture_Delete or by returning it to the caller as a pf_sub_source return value. Provided for convenience.
This function gives all input attachments at once.
You MUST release the returned values
This function duplicates every variables from the filter, and adds a proxy callback to trigger filter events from obj.

parameterdescription.para: a vlc_callback_t to call if the event means restarting the filter (i.e. an event on a non-command variable)

detaileddescription.para: This function removes the callbacks previously added to every duplicated variables, and removes them afterward.

parameterdescription.para: the same vlc_callback_t passed to filter_AddProxyCallbacks

detaileddescription.para: It creates a blend filter.
Only the chroma properties of the dest format is used (chroma type, rgb masks and shifts)

memberdef.argsstring: (filter_t *, int i_dst_width, int i_dst_height, const video_format_t *p_src)
memberdef.name: filter_ConfigureBlend

detaileddescription.para: It configures blend filter parameters that are allowed to changed after the creation.

memberdef.argsstring: (filter_t *, picture_t *p_dst, int i_dst_x, int i_dst_y, const picture_t *p_src, int i_alpha)
memberdef.name: filter_Blend

detaileddescription.para: It blends a picture into another one.
The input picture is not modified and not released.
It destroys a blend filter created by filter_NewBlend.
Create new filter chain

parameterdescription.para: vlc capability of filters in filter chain

detaileddescription.para: Creates a new video filter chain.

parameterdescription.para: whether to allow changing the output format

simplesect.para: new filter chain, or NULL on error

detaileddescription.para: Delete filter chain will delete all filters in the chain and free all allocated data. The pointer to the filter chain is then no longer valid.
Reset filter chain will delete all filters in the chain and reset p_fmt_in and p_fmt_out to the new values.

parameterdescription.para: new fmt_in params, may be NULL to leave input fmt unchanged
new fmt_out params, may be NULL to leave output fmt unchanged

memberdef.argsstring: (filter_chain_t *chain, const char *name, config_chain_t *cfg, const es_format_t *fmt_in, const es_format_t *fmt_out)
memberdef.name: filter_chain_AppendFilter

detaileddescription.para: Append a filter to the chain.

parameterdescription.para: filter chain to append a filter to

simplesect.para: a pointer to the filter or NULL on error

detaileddescription.para: Append a conversion to the chain.

parameterdescription.para: filter chain to append a filter to

detaileddescription.para: Append new filter to filter chain from string.

parameterdescription.para: filter chain to append a filter to

detaileddescription.para: Delete filter from filter chain. This function also releases the filter object and unloads the filter modules. The pointer to p_filter is no longer valid after this function successfully returns.

parameterdescription.para: filter chain to remove the filter from
filter to remove from the chain and delete

detaileddescription.para: Checks if the filter chain is empty.

simplesect.para: true if and only if there are no filters in this filter chain

detaileddescription.para: Get last output format of the last element in the filter chain.
Apply the filter chain to a video picture.

simplesect.para: modified picture after applying all video filters

detaileddescription.para: Flush a video filter chain.
Generate subpictures from a chain of subpicture source "filters".
Apply filter chain to subpictures.

simplesect.para: modified subpicture after applying all subpicture filters

detaileddescription.para: Apply the filter chain to a mouse state.
It will be applied from the output to the input. It makes sense only for a video filter chain.
The vlc_mouse_t* pointers may be the same.
Inform the filter chain of mouse state.
It makes sense only for a sub source chain.

memberdef.name: VIDEO_FILTER_WRAPPER
memberdef.initializer: static picture_t *name ## _Filter ( filter_t *p_filter, \ picture_t *p_pic ) \ { \ picture_t *p_outpic = filter_NewPicture( p_filter ); \ if( p_outpic ) \ { \ name( p_filter, p_pic, p_outpic ); \ picture_CopyProperties( p_outpic, p_pic ); \ } \ picture_Release( p_pic ); \ return p_outpic; \ }

detaileddescription.para: Create a picture_t *(*)( filter_t *, picture_t * ) compatible wrapper using a void (*)( filter_t *, picture_t *, picture_t * ) function
Currently used by the chroma video filters
Audio, video, text filters
